name: @developai/grounded-node-runtime
description: Shared scaffolding for GROUNDED Nodes: lite host (storage/AI/parse/log shim) + Express server boot + family chrome and telemetry endpoint. Mirrors the GROUNDED facade interface so the same Node code runs standalone on a newsroom laptop and integrated into the GROUNDED monorepo.
comment_hostedDependencies: Only createHostedServer (online multi-tenant mode) uses these, and it imports them lazily — so a newsroom's LOCAL install never loads or needs them. Optional so a flaky build (e.g. pg native bits) can't break a local install.
